decisions.reasoning: Flare Blitz is a guaranteed OHKO on Rillaboom, satisfying the primary decision priority to secure a KO immediately.
Flare Blitz is a guaranteed OHKO on Flutter Mane, removing a major offensive threat immediately. Since I can secure the KO, I must prioritize attacking over switching or utility moves.

Incineroar has fainted, and I need to bring in a check to Flutter Mane. Kingambit resists Fairy and Ghost moves, making it the safest switch-in to handle the remaining 10% HP of the opponent's Flutter Mane.
Shadow Ball is a guaranteed OHKO on the opponent's Flutter Mane, securing the knockout regardless of the speed tie outcome.
I outspeed Tornadus-Therian and can 2HKO it with Shadow Ball. Since it cannot OHKO me, attacking is the optimal play to secure the KO and maintain momentum.
I outspeed Tornadus-Therian and Moonblast is a guaranteed 2HKO, whereas their best move only 3HKOs me. Staying in to secure the KO is the optimal play according to the priority list.
